rulings.Case Title: ALCIDES VALLADARES PERLA VS. DMG ASET MANAGEMENT LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 28, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Bank of America's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to 1, 2 and 3rd causes of action. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that he private right of action exists under HAMP or Consent Decree. Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to 4th cause of action for negligence only to allege legal duty. =(AJR)

rulings.Case Title: FILLMORE DEVELOPMENT COMMERCIAL LLC, VS. YOSHI'S SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 28, 2013, line 2 - PLAINTIFF FILLMORE DEVELOPMENT COMMERCIAL LLC's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver. Plaintiff's Motion for Appointment of Receiver is OFF CALENDAR per moving party. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CLIFFORD JUNG VS. HON LAM YEUNG
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-12-842477 WITH CASE CGC-12-526785
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 28, 2013, line 3 - PLAINTIFF CLIFFORD JUNG's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-12-842477 WITH CASE CGC-12-526785. Plaintiff's Motion to consolidate cases CSM-12-842477 with case CGC-12-526785 is DENIED without prejudice. Demurrer to Complaint in case 526785 was sustained with leave to amended on May 13, 2013. No amended complaint on file. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: NINA ZHIGADLO VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 28, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. First Amended Complaint filed May 24, 2013. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: YUL D. DORN et al VS. EMC MORTGAGE CORPORATION NOW DOING BUSINESS AS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 28, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANTs JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. and EMC MORTGAGE, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN N TRAN VS. DAVID SPRINGER
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 28, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT DAVID SPRINGER's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Defendants' Motion to Set Aside Default Judgment is GRANTED. Defendant shall file his proposed answer to compliant (referenced in Proof of Service) no later May 28, 2013. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNA KONG VS. SARA ELMER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 28, 2013, line 7 - DEFENDANT SARA ELMER MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default. Hearing is required re: (1) apparently false Proof of Service; and (2) basis for attorney's fees requested by Defendant. Plaintiff and process server, Lan Le, to be personally present. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: STOCKTON, JUDITH AS TRUSTEE OF THE JUDITH STOCKTON VS. MARIANGELA URQUIZO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 28, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANT MARIANGELA URQUIZO's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default is DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain her burden under CCP 473(b). Proof of Service by Registered Process Servicer and Certified Mail receipt on file. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: 691 O'FARRELL STREET, LLC VS. KIM, LYNN, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA NITE CAP BAR et al
